title: Maraivaasi
desc: A billionaire's son returns after his father's death and joins the company as a regular employee in order to nab the people responsible for his father's murder.

title: Kadhaludan
desc: In order to know more about Kavitha, his future wife, Kalyan decides to meet her without revealing his true identity. However, when he falls in love with her, a big revelation changes his life.

title: Vetri Vizha
desc: A man suffers from amnesia after an accident and tries to get his life back together. However, things take a turn when he starts remembering his past.

title: Appu
desc: Taxi driver Appu is haunted by his past when his sister gets killed by a eunuch who was also a powerful pimp. While trying to find him, he comes across another girl who is about to meet the same fate.

title: Gajendra
desc: Gajendra, an orphan, unabashedly dotes on a girl with a mental disability. However, he faces trouble when his family questions his relationship with the girl, and he refuses to reveal the truth.
